title: B.box Kids Lunch Box 2-Pack $29.99 Delivered @ Costco Wholesale (Membership Required)
body:
Deal: B.box Kids Lunch Box 2-Pack $29.99 Delivered @ Costco Wholesale (Membership Required)

[Mjk698] How are these better than any other $5 box from KMART?
[fortunecookie] Is this a good size for prep/ preschool?
[caprimulgus] I would think it would depend how much your kid eats.
We have all of the sizes: Lunchbox (2L), Mini Lunchbox (1L), Snackbox (350ml). Fwiw, we initially used the Lunchbox, but have been mainly using Mini Lunchbox + Snackbox for our 5yo (4yo kinder).
I think its handy to have all 3 sizes, so you can mix and match to go up or down in capacity as needed.
[fortunecookie] Thanks! Would 2 be an overkill? 2L seems quite big. Not sure if we have room to store two in the cupboard
[caprimulgus] If you have 2, it means you can rotate, and not have to clean it everyday for the next day…but certainly you could manage with one.
Up to you whether it's with the extra cost / space to have 2.
[danielglongo] This lunchbox is great and I approve it. $29.90 is a bargain. My kids are 7 and 4 and they’ve been using it since kindy, throwing around, dropping on the floor, etc.. you name it.
The only thing that happened so far is that one of the tabs that hold the lid in place broke, so I had to get a new one, other than that It’s all good.
[step_hen] Fantastic price and great lunch box! My sons has lasted 3.5 years and still going strong! Only buying as my other son dropped his and cracked the lid.
Highly recommend!
[Kaiserschmarrn] So much plastic! Stainless steel bento boxes are the way to go.
[Ezuku] These are really nice lunch boxes, very practical and this is a fantastic price. I have one and I'll definitely be buying a couple more.
